programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: 2 Unlocks & a Funeral; Truth: Was I Robbed of Raising You?

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A woman is granted a lifetime restraining order against an ex-boyfriend who sues her for thousands in personal belongings he says she never returned.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A firearms instructor seeks compensation for a valuable rifle he loaned to an ailing client; the defendant says he sold the weapon after the client passed away to satisfy a debt owed by the deceased.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A veteran nutritionist takes legal action against a client who stopped payment for her contracted weight loss services; the client fights back citing claims of body-shaming and a pre-existing medical condition.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A woman sues her husband's personal trainer for overcharging; the trainer counters with car damage claims due to her husband's dementia-related mobility issues; controversial staged videos are submitted as evidence.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve provides surprising updates to two stories in which he helped families move forward with their lives and got them the truth and justice they coveted.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Truth: Did Mom Die With a Secret?; Unlock: Ghosted on My Birthday
programme.desc: Timara received a message that turned her world upside down: the man who raised her may not be her biological father; Roderick may be her real dad, but he was never before told he might be; B-NO says girlfriend Meezie is controlling and treats him like she is his parent, but he insists he's not cheating and wants to make the relationship work.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: After an apartment fire made her homeless, a woman sues a former friend who offered her a place to stay, for a wrongful eviction and unwanted sexual advances while staying with him; he countersues for damages due to false accusations.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A couple reunites after 30 years only to be torn apart over personal loans after an ex-girlfriend comes back into the picture; both parties sue for the 10 thousand court maximum when the cost of a Wolfdog and alleged loss of income fall into dispute.
